name: Instant Super Shot Stealth Elf
primary_game: Skylanders: SuperChargers (iOS) (in the game files of the console versions)
appearances: Skylanders: SuperChargers (iOS) (in the game files of the console versions)
description: Instant Super Shot Stealth Elf is a digital counterpart of Super Shot Stealth Elf in Skylanders: SuperChargers. She is only playable in the iOS version of the game.
biography: Instant Super Shot Stealth Elf is a digital counterpart of Super Shot Stealth Elf in Skylanders: SuperChargers. She is only playable in the iOS version of the game.
trivia: She is the only Instant counterpart of a Skylander from Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure.
